## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Enterpret and GrowthX to explore potential partnership for content marketing and AI visibility improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Enterpret seeks to improve AI/SEO visibility and content marketing, lacking in-house expertise](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a two-phase approach: strategy sprint followed by high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [GrowthX's AI-powered workflows and human expertise enable scalable, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Enterpret's current demand is 90% inbound, with referrals and influencer marketing as top channels](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### Enterpret's Business and Current Marketing Efforts

  - [B2B SaaS company building a voice of customer platform](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Integrates with existing feedback channels (e.g., Zendesk, Twitter)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Uses custom AI models to analyze customer feedback](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Notable clients: Canva, Figma, Notion, Netflix, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Current marketing:](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
      - [90% inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
      - [Top channels: referrals, influencer marketing (e.g., Ladies Podcasts)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [Google Ads, LinkedIn ads](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
      - [Recently started LinkedIn thought leadership program](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Capabilities

  - [Two-phase engagement model:](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
    1.  Strategy sprint (6-8 weeks):
          - [Develop brand voice, tone, structure](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
          - [Create content strategy and roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
          - [Publish initial content (e.g., 10 articles in 5 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
    2.  Execution phase:
          - [High-volume content production (5-15 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
          - [Ongoing strategy refinement](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Team composition:](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
      - [70+ employees](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
      - [Leadership from editorial backgrounds (e.g., TechCrunch)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
      - [Managing directors with 20+ years in SEO/growth](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Managing editors for hands-on content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [AI-powered platform with human-in-the-loop workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Capabilities include research, outlines, content creation, fact-checking, and image generation](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)

### AI Visibility Measurement and Strategy

  - [GrowthX uses third-party tools (e.g., Scrunch) to track AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Measures brand presence in AI-powered search results (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT)](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Acknowledges current limitations and variability in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [Focuses on identifying and targeting relevant prompts/questions](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)

### Content Marketing Philosophy

  - [Emphasis on high-quality, persona-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Aims to create valuable answers to key audience questions](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Believes in transferable benefits between SEO and AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Advocates for a publisher-like approach to content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a detailed proposal to Enterpret](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
  - [Enterpret to review proposal and prepare additional questions](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up call to discuss proposal and next steps](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Enterpret to provide any necessary information for proposal customization](https://fathom.video/share/XSyvs5z_UBUb9zmWtEAouczJZDDoiqxs?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
